← all 386 games

Rhythm Games

Turn your sound on for these. Beat-locked dodging, tempo tapping, BPM duels — rhythm games are the rare genre where your ears do half the work. Every one here runs instantly in the browser and scores your timing precision, not just your survival.

Questions

Do I need sound on for rhythm games?

Strongly recommended — the audio IS the gameplay. They remain technically playable muted using visual cues, but you lose the best part.

Are these rhythm games free?

Yes, free in the browser with no download — tap and play.

More collections

Games to Play When Bored 1-Minute Games Calming Games Games That Feel Good When You’re Anxious Games to Play in Bed When You Can’t Sleep Fidget Games Oddly Satisfying Games Sensory Games Memory Test Games Reaction Time Games Face-Controlled Games Precision Games Weird Games Games to Challenge Your Friends
